use_codes.desc: SOTYLIZE IS INDICATED FOR THE MAINTENANCE OF NORMAL SINUS RHYTHM [DELAY IN TIME TO RECURRENCE OF ATRIAL FIBRILLATION/ATRIAL FLUTTER (AFIB/AFL)] IN PATIENTS WITH SYMPTOMATIC AFIB/AFL WHO ARE CURRENTLY IN SINUS RHYTHM
INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF VENTRICULAR ARRHYTHMIAS, SUCH AS SUSTAINED VENTRICULAR TACHYCARDIA, THAT IN THE JUDGEMENT OF THE PHYSICIAN ARE LIFE-THREATENING
